title: Panic Reset: 10 Scripture Declarations
script: Say this when panic hits. Speaking truth out loud interrupts the anxious loop and steadies your breath. Repeat after me: God is with me. I will not fear. I give You my worry. Your peace guards my heart and mind. You are my refuge and my fortress. You restore my soul. You strengthen me for this moment. Your perfect love casts out fear. I cast my cares on You because You care for me. Nothing can separate me from Your love. Again, peace is mine in Christ. Stay here as long as you need. You’re not failing—you’re being held.

title: Night Anxiety: Speak Peace Over Your Mind
hook: If you're feeling anxious, watch this.
script: If you're feeling anxious, watch this. Your brain believes what your mouth repeats. Let’s anchor in God’s Word. Repeat after me, steady and slow: The Lord is my light and my salvation. I am not afraid. I am not alone; You are with me. You keep in perfect peace the mind that trusts You. I choose to trust You now. I bring my requests with thanksgiving, and Your peace guards me. You are near to the brokenhearted. I cast this weight on You. Your joy is my strength. I will lie down and sleep in peace. Amen.

title: Overthinking Breaker: 10 Truths to Say Out Loud
hook: This truth can change how you see your struggle.
script: This truth can change how you see your struggle: when you speak God’s promises, your nervous system shifts from danger to safety. Try it now. Repeat after me: I trust You with this moment. Be still, my soul; God is God. You go before me and You are with me. I receive Your peace, not as the world gives. I choose courage, not fear. I pray and release, and Your peace guards my mind. Your grace is sufficient for me. You are my refuge and strength. You will never leave me. I am safe in Your love right now.
